name: Global Water Asset Corp.
summary: Global Water Asset Corp., a development stage company, focuses on the acquisition and development of spring water resources in North America. The company, through its subsidiaries, owns spring water properties and options to acquire spring water properties. It holds a portfolio of properties in Eastern Canada. Global Water Asset Corp. was formerly known as Water Bank of America (USA), Inc. and changed its name to Global Water Asset Corp. in October 2010. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
